channel.title: Project SLSSM-01 Research Updates
channel.description: Updates from Project SLSSM-01's observable spectral dynamics research dossier.

item.title: Observable Spectral Dynamics in a Recurrent Sequence Model
item.description: Research note with rounded evidence from Project SLSSM-01's v3 short-context run, including EDMD concordance, signed phase behavior, prompt manifold observations, and the long-memory limitation.
